tldr: Davide Ballerini took the cobbled sprint into Naples for XDS Astana, beating Jasper Stuyven and Paul Magnier on the Piazza del Plebiscito straight. GC stayed with Afonso Eulálio.

narrative.headline: Naples sprint to Ballerini
narrative.body: ~142-144 km from Paestum to Naples on a fast flat coastal stage with one early cat-4 climb at Cava de' Tirreni. Technical cobbled finish on Piazza del Plebiscito with a sharp final bend ~300-400 m from the line. Ballerini timed it best.

gcImpact.headline: Eulálio's pink before the Blockhaus
gcImpact.body: GC: Eulálio 24:47:13, 2:51 ahead of Igor Arrieta, 3:34 ahead of Scaroni. Stage 7 Blockhaus would scramble all of it.
